## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Package staging/consumer/tarball checks, if package metadata or release behavior changed
- [ ] Not applicable; reason:

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests or source references were updated before behavior/documentation changes.
- [ ] Host/Guest/Broker/Peer terminology is precise.
- [ ] Unsupported HTTP/3, browser, Rust, Go, Java, and Python Host behavior is not described as implemented.
- [ ] Public gateway, authentication, authorization, and routing-policy boundaries remain clear.
- [ ] Generated files, local certificates, credentials, and build artifacts are not committed.
- [ ] Release, secret, visibility, and first-public-publish steps remain maintainer-controlled manual gates.
